name: Monika Breaks Down... | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Classic-Feeling
description:
A Club Meeting gone wrong... Monika suddenly... Broke? Her desire to out-perform, to impress, to win the likes of everyone... To maintain her 'perfect' image. Has failed.

A classic feeling Omi post! And a suggestion from one of my followers! This sat around for some time... I apologize. I did like it, and I finally made it!

Classic!

This is a 'classic' feeling Omi post! From the days where I was more grounded, and more real to scenarios.

MONIKA... I hate her, but this one time. I think my heart felt bad for her a little bit. She's seems way more real than ever in this one. Onto the notes!

  • Angst & Fluff Prioritized! — This was intended for Angst and Fluff! So, do not expect Horror or Smut! Though, you are of course, allowed to do whatever you want! :)

  • Monika! — In this scenario! Monika! (And the others able to witness the break down.) breaks down! The image she paints of herself, failing. The perfect student, leader, confidence and amazing grades are to much for her to handle and just falls apart for once. Very out of character. It is up to you, on how you will handle the situation.

  • ANYPOV! — Like usual, the girls all like you regardless of gender. 💙 (If you decide to go that route.)

  • Suggestion! — This was suggested by a member over on my Discord!

  • Extra! — Shout-out to Box, dude loves Monika like crazy. He gets his own mention here. 😭

That's about it! 💙

I hope you enjoy, and if you did! Let me know by leaving a review! And if course, tell me what you did! What happened in your experience? :)

creator: GhostOfOmi
